parameters.jsCode:
// VaultGuard MCP server returns classification directly (no choices wrapper)
const invoice = $('Parse Invoice Array').item.json;
const classification = $input.first().json;

// Build WORKING sheet row
const description = `${invoice.serial_number}/${invoice.ship_name}`;

return [{
  json: {
    // Original invoice fields
    serial_number:   invoice.serial_number,
    branch_number:   invoice.branch_number,
    invoice_number:  invoice.invoice_number,
    invoice_date:    invoice.invoice_date,
    total_amount:    invoice.total_amount,
    item_amount:     invoice.subtotal,
    po_number:       invoice.po_number,
    ship_name:       invoice.ship_name,
    ship_addr1:      invoice.ship_addr1,
    ship_city:       invoice.ship_city,
    ship_state:      invoice.ship_state,
    ship_zip:        invoice.ship_zip,
    call_number:     invoice.call_number,
    labor_charge:    invoice.labor_charge,
    parts_amount:    invoice.parts_amount,
    shipping_amount: invoice.shipping_amount,
    subtotal:        invoice.subtotal,
    tax_amount:      invoice.tax_amount,
    oos_tier1:       invoice.oos_tier1,
    oos_tier2:       invoice.oos_tier2,
    comment:         invoice.comment,
    // AI classification from VaultGuard MCP
    bill_customer:   classification.decision,
    gl_code:         classification.gl_code,
    ai_confidence:   classification.confidence,
    ai_reason:       classification.reason,
    flag_for_review: classification.flag_for_review || false,
    // Oracle upload fields
    description:     description,
    vendor_name:     'TIDEL ENGINEERING',
    vendor_number:   151176,
    vendor_site:     'CARROLLTON',
    company:         '01',
    lob:             '500',
    dept:            '00',
    // Metadata
    batchName:       invoice.batchName,
    index:           invoice.index
  }
}];

parameters.subject: =✅ Tidel Invoice Batch Processed — {{ $json.batchName }} — {{ $json.totalInvoices }} invoices
parameters.message:
=Tidel invoice batch has been processed and classified.

=== BATCH SUMMARY ===
Batch Name:       {{ $json.batchName }}
Total Invoices:   {{ $json.totalInvoices }}
Bill to Client:   {{ $json.billClient }} invoices  (${{ $json.billYesAmount }})
VaultGuard absorbs: {{ $json.vaultguardAbsorbs }} invoices  (${{ $json.billNoAmount }})
Total Amount:     ${{ $json.totalAmount }}

=== ACTION REQUIRED ===
{{ $json.flaggedForReview }} invoice(s) flagged for human review before Oracle upload:
{{ $json.flaggedInvoices.join('\n') }}

=== NEXT STEPS ===
1. Review the WORKING sheet attached — check flagged invoices
2. Once confirmed, upload the ORACLE_UPLOAD sheet to the Loomis Invoice Bulk Loader WebADI
3. Verify batch total matches: ${{ $json.totalAmount }}

Files attached:
- {{ $json.batchName }}_WORKING.csv
- {{ $json.batchName }}_ORACLE_UPLOAD.csv

Classified by VaultGuard Maintenance Intelligence Platform.

nodes.name: Email — Send Results to Billing Team

parameters.subject: =⚠️ {{ $json.flaggedForReview }} Invoice(s) Need Review — {{ $json.batchName }}

main.node: Email — Send Results to Billing Team
